intune.comment: Leave filter_os empty to report all enrolled platforms. Set to 'macOS', 'Windows', 'iOS', or 'Android' to scope to a single platform.

email_security.comment: Leave domains empty to auto-discover verified tenant domains (excluding *.onmicrosoft.us). Specify a list to override, e.g. ["decisivellc.us"].

policies.comment: Paste the URL of your SharePoint policy document library (the Forms/AllItems.aspx page works). Examples: https://contoso.sharepoint.us/IT%20Policies/Forms/AllItems.aspx or https://contoso.sharepoint.us/sites/Compliance/Shared%20Documents/Forms/AllItems.aspx. Leave empty to skip.

exceptions.comment: List UPNs of break-glass (emergency access) accounts. These accounts are intentionally excepted from MFA-required and inactivity gaps since best practice is to keep them offline with physical-only access. Example: ["BG_RM@contoso.onmicrosoft.us"].

schedule.comment: Set to 'weekly' if running via GitHub Actions
